current_scorecard.title: The GPT Surprise: Offering Large Language Model Chat in a Massive Coding Class Reduced Engagement but Increased Adopters' Exam Performances
current_scorecard.authors_full: Allen Nie, Yash Chandak, Miroslav Suzara, Ali Malik, Juliette Woodrow, Matt Peng, Mehran Sahami, Emma Brunskill, Chris Piech
current_scorecard.setting_detail: Global (146 countries), online intro coding course

estimates.study_label: Nie et al., Exam participation rate
estimates.treatment: Access to GPT-4 chat interface (advertisement + access)
